ogTitle: Martyville vs Maryborough West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Martyville and Maryborough West.
heading: Martyville vs Maryborough West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Martyville, Queensland and Maryborough West, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Martyville has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Maryborough West (30/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Martyville or Maryborough West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Martyville has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Maryborough West scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Martyville scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Maryborough West scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Martyville or Maryborough West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Martyville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
